description: An AI-first SaaS platform for AWS cost analysis and optimization. The Convex Agent component drives all analysis workflows autonomously, with Cloudflare Containers providing secure sandbox execution of AWS CLI commands. Includes multi-tenancy, Stripe billing, and partner dashboards.

userStories.title: Initialize monorepo structure
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a properly structured monorepo so that I can develop the frontend, backend, and sandbox independently
acceptanceCriteria: Create aws-optimizer/ directory with apps/web, apps/sandbox, and packages/convex structure
Initialize package.json with workspaces configuration
Set up TypeScript configuration for all packages
Add root-level scripts for dev, build, and lint
Create .gitignore with appropriate exclusions

userStories.title: Set up Convex backend with component registrations
userStories.description: As a developer, I want Convex configured with all required components so that I can build the backend features
acceptanceCriteria: Initialize Convex in packages/convex directory
Register @convex-dev/agent component in convex.config.ts
Register @convex-dev/stripe component
Register @convex-dev/better-auth component
Register @convex-dev/rate-limiter component
Register @convex-dev/resend component
Register @convex-dev/workpool component
Register @convex-dev/action-retrier component
Verify convex dev runs without errors

userStories.title: Define core Convex schema - organizations and users
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the core database schema defined so that I can implement multi-tenancy
acceptanceCriteria: Create organizations table with name, slug, plan, settings fields
Create orgMembers table with organizationId, userId, role (owner/admin/member/viewer)
Create users table matching Better Auth structure with email, name, role, status
Add appropriate indexes for all tables
Schema validates successfully with convex dev

userStories.title: Define Convex schema - AWS integration tables
userStories.description: As a developer, I want AWS-related tables defined so that I can store account connections and execution logs
acceptanceCriteria: Create awsAccounts table with organizationId, name, accountNumber, connectionType, status
Create awsCredentials table with awsAccountId, encrypted credential fields, roleArn
Create sandboxExecutions table with awsAccountId, command, stdout, stderr, exitCode, executionTime
Add indexes for efficient querying by organization and account
userStories.notes: Credentials stored encrypted, decrypted only for sandbox injection

userStories.title: Define Convex schema - AI and analysis tables
userStories.description: As a developer, I want AI and analysis tables defined so that I can store cost data and recommendations
acceptanceCriteria: Create analysisRuns table with organizationId, type, status, startedAt, completedAt
Create costSnapshots table with awsAccountId, date, totalCost, breakdown by service/region
Create resources table with awsAccountId, resourceType, resourceId, name, region, tags, monthlyCost
Create recommendations table with awsAccountId, type, title, description, estimatedSavings, status
Add indexes for time-series queries and filtering
userStories.notes: AI agent populates these tables via tools

userStories.title: Define Convex schema - billing and features tables
userStories.description: As a developer, I want billing and feature tables defined so that I can implement subscriptions and alerts
acceptanceCriteria: Create subscriptions table with organizationId, stripeCustomerId, planId, status, currentPeriodEnd
Create budgets table with organizationId, awsAccountId, name, amount, period, alertThresholds
Create alerts table with organizationId, type, title, message, severity, triggeredAt, acknowledgedAt
Create reports table with organizationId, type, title, status, fileUrl, generatedAt
userStories.notes: Stripe component handles webhook signature verification

userStories.title: Set up Better Auth authentication
userStories.description: As a user, I want to sign up and log in with email/password so that I can access my account securely
acceptanceCriteria: Configure Better Auth with email/password provider
Create auth.ts with getAuthUser and safeGetAuthUser helpers
Create functions.ts with requireAuth, requireWriteAccess, requirePublishAccess helpers
Set up HTTP routes for auth endpoints (/api/auth/*)
Test authentication flow works end-to-end
userStories.notes: Follow pruva-admin/convex/auth.ts and functions.ts patterns exactly

userStories.title: Implement organization CRUD operations
userStories.description: As a user, I want to create and manage organizations so that I can organize my AWS accounts
acceptanceCriteria: Create organizations.ts with create, update, delete mutations
Implement getById and list queries
Auto-create orgMember with 'owner' role when organization is created
Require authentication for all operations
Add activity logging for organization changes
userStories.notes: Owner is automatically added when org is created

userStories.title: Implement organization member management
userStories.description: As an organization owner, I want to invite and manage team members so that we can collaborate
acceptanceCriteria: Create orgMembers.ts with invite, updateRole, remove mutations
Implement list query filtered by organizationId
Only owners and admins can manage members
Prevent removing the last owner
Send invite email via Resend component
userStories.notes: Role hierarchy: owner > admin > member > viewer

userStories.title: Set up Cloudflare Container sandbox worker
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the sandbox worker deployed so that I can execute AWS CLI commands securely
acceptanceCriteria: Copy poc/ structure to apps/sandbox/
Verify Dockerfile builds successfully with AWS CLI v2
Implement /health and /execute endpoints
Add request validation and AWS command restriction
Configure wrangler.jsonc with container settings
Test sandbox locally with wrangler dev
userStories.notes: Use existing poc/ implementation as base

userStories.title: Create sandbox.ts Convex action for AWS execution
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a Convex action that calls the sandbox so that I can execute AWS commands from the backend
acceptanceCriteria: Create sandbox.ts with executeCommand action
Decrypt AWS credentials from awsCredentials table
Call sandbox worker /execute endpoint with credentials
Store execution result in sandboxExecutions table
Apply rate limiting via rate-limiter component
Use action-retrier for reliability
userStories.notes: Credentials decrypted only at execution time

userStories.title: Implement AWS account connection - IAM role
userStories.description: As a user, I want to connect my AWS account via IAM role so that the platform can analyze my costs securely
acceptanceCriteria: Create awsAccounts.ts with connectWithRole mutation
Accept roleArn and externalId parameters
Generate CloudFormation template for users to create the role
Test role assumption via sandbox (aws sts assume-role)
Store connection in awsAccounts table with 'connected' status

userStories.title: Implement AWS account connection - access keys
userStories.description: As a user, I want to connect my AWS account via access keys so that I have a simpler setup option
acceptanceCriteria: Add connectWithKeys mutation to awsAccounts.ts
Accept accessKeyId and secretAccessKey parameters
Encrypt credentials before storing in awsCredentials table
Test credentials via sandbox (aws sts get-caller-identity)
Display security warning about key-based access
userStories.notes: Less secure but simpler for some users

userStories.title: Set up AI Agent with OpenRouter
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the AI agent configured so that it can drive cost analysis workflows
acceptanceCriteria: Create ai/awsCostAgent.ts with Agent configuration
Configure OpenRouter with anthropic/claude-sonnet-4 model
Write comprehensive system instructions for AWS cost optimization
Set maxSteps to 100 for complex workflows
Export agent instance for use in chat handlers

userStories.title: Implement AI agent AWS command tools
userStories.description: As the AI agent, I want tools to execute AWS commands so that I can gather cost and resource data
acceptanceCriteria: Create ai/tools/awsCommands.ts with aws_executeCommand tool
Create aws_getCostData tool for Cost Explorer queries
Create aws_listResources tool for EC2, RDS, S3 inventory
Create aws_getReservations tool for RI/Savings Plan data
Tools call sandbox.executeCommand action internally
userStories.notes: Tools are called by AI agent autonomously

userStories.title: Implement AI agent analysis tools
userStories.description: As the AI agent, I want tools to save analysis results so that data persists in the database
acceptanceCriteria: Create ai/tools/analysis.ts with analysis_saveCostSnapshot tool
Create analysis_saveResource tool for inventory items
Create recommendation_save tool for savings recommendations
Create analysis_generateReport tool for PDF/CSV generation
Tools use internal mutations to store data
userStories.notes: Agent uses these to persist findings

userStories.title: Implement AI agent notification tools
userStories.description: As the AI agent, I want tools to send notifications so that users are alerted to important findings
acceptanceCriteria: Create ai/tools/notifications.ts with notification_send tool
Create analysis_createAlert tool for budget/anomaly alerts
Integrate with Resend component for email delivery
Store alerts in alerts table for dashboard display

userStories.title: Implement AI chat handlers and thread management
userStories.description: As a user, I want to chat with the AI assistant so that I can ask questions about my AWS costs
acceptanceCriteria: Create ai/chat.ts with sendMessage action for streaming responses
Create ai/threads.ts with list, create, delete operations
Implement message history storage via Agent component
Support streaming responses to frontend
Require authentication and organization context

userStories.title: Set up React frontend with Mantine and TanStack Router
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the frontend scaffolded so that I can build the user interface
acceptanceCriteria: Initialize Vite React TypeScript project in apps/web
Install and configure Mantine v8 with theme from pruva-admin
Set up TanStack Router with file-based routing
Configure Convex client provider
Set up MobX stores structure with RootStore pattern
Verify app runs with npm run dev

userStories.title: Implement authentication pages
userStories.description: As a user, I want login and signup pages so that I can access my account
acceptanceCriteria: Create /login route with email/password form
Create /signup route with registration form
Create /forgot-password route for password reset
Integrate with Better Auth endpoints
Redirect to /chat after successful login
Show validation errors appropriately

userStories.title: Create app shell layout with navigation
userStories.description: As a user, I want a consistent navigation layout so that I can move between sections easily
acceptanceCriteria: Create AppShell component with sidebar navigation
Add navigation items: Chat, Dashboard, Costs, Resources, Recommendations, Terminal, Budgets, Alerts, Reports, Accounts, Settings, Billing, Team
Highlight active route in navigation
Show user profile and logout in header
Make layout responsive for mobile

userStories.title: Implement AI chat interface page
userStories.description: As a user, I want a chat interface so that I can interact with the AI assistant
acceptanceCriteria: Create /chat route as primary UI
Display message history with user and assistant messages
Implement chat input with send button and Enter key support
Show streaming responses in real-time
Display thread list in sidebar for conversation history
Allow creating new threads

userStories.title: Implement AWS accounts management page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to manage my AWS account connections so that I can add or remove accounts
acceptanceCriteria: Create /accounts route with list of connected accounts
Show connection status, account number, and last sync time
Add 'Connect Account' button with modal for IAM role or access key
Provide CloudFormation template download for IAM role setup
Allow disconnecting accounts with confirmation

userStories.title: Implement cost dashboard page
userStories.description: As a user, I want a dashboard showing my AWS costs so that I can understand my spending at a glance
acceptanceCriteria: Create /dashboard route with cost overview
Show total cost for current month with comparison to previous month
Display cost breakdown by service (pie chart)
Display cost trend over time (line chart)
Show top 5 recommendations with estimated savings
Support multi-account aggregation
userStories.notes: Uses data populated by AI agent

userStories.title: Implement cost explorer page
userStories.description: As a user, I want detailed cost exploration so that I can analyze spending patterns
acceptanceCriteria: Create /costs route with filterable cost data
Filter by date range, service, region, account, tags
Display costs in table format with sorting
Show daily/weekly/monthly views
Allow CSV export of filtered data

userStories.title: Implement resources inventory page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see my AWS resources so that I know what I'm paying for
acceptanceCriteria: Create /resources route with resource inventory
Filter by resource type (EC2, RDS, S3, etc.), region, account
Display resource details: name, type, region, monthly cost estimate
Show resource tags for categorization
Link resources to recommendations where applicable

userStories.title: Implement recommendations page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see savings recommendations so that I can reduce my AWS costs
acceptanceCriteria: Create /recommendations route with AI-generated recommendations
Display recommendation title, description, and estimated savings
Filter by type (rightsizing, reserved instances, unused resources, etc.)
Allow marking recommendations as implemented or dismissed
Show total potential savings at top

userStories.title: Implement manual terminal page
userStories.description: As a power user, I want to execute AWS CLI commands directly so that I can debug and explore
acceptanceCriteria: Create /terminal route with command input
Select AWS account to execute against
Display command output with syntax highlighting
Show command history for current session
Restrict to read-only commands by default with override option

userStories.title: Implement budgets management page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to set budgets so that I can track spending against limits
acceptanceCriteria: Create /budgets route with budget list
Allow creating budgets with name, amount, period (monthly/quarterly/yearly)
Set alert thresholds (e.g., 50%, 80%, 100%)
Display current spend vs. budget with progress bar
Support per-account or organization-wide budgets

userStories.title: Implement alerts page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see and manage alerts so that I can respond to cost issues
acceptanceCriteria: Create /alerts route with alert history
Display alert type, title, message, severity, and timestamp
Allow acknowledging alerts
Filter by type (budget, anomaly, recommendation) and status
Show unacknowledged alert count in navigation
userStories.notes: AI agent and budget system trigger alerts

userStories.title: Implement reports page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to generate and view reports so that I can share cost insights with stakeholders
acceptanceCriteria: Create /reports route with report history
Allow generating new reports (PDF or CSV)
Select report type: summary, detailed, recommendation, comparison
Display report status and download link when ready
Support scheduling reports for automatic generation

userStories.title: Set up Stripe billing integration
userStories.description: As a developer, I want Stripe integrated so that users can subscribe to paid plans
acceptanceCriteria: Configure @convex-dev/stripe component with API keys
Create stripe.ts with customer and subscription management
Set up webhook handler for subscription events
Define plan tiers: Free (1 account), Pro (5 accounts), Enterprise (unlimited)
Create usage-based pricing for AI analysis runs

userStories.title: Implement billing page with Stripe portal
userStories.description: As a user, I want to manage my subscription so that I can upgrade or change my plan
acceptanceCriteria: Create /billing route with current plan display
Show usage statistics (accounts connected, analysis runs)
Integrate Stripe Customer Portal for plan management
Display invoice history
Show upgrade prompts when approaching limits
userStories.notes: Stripe Customer Portal handles payment methods

userStories.title: Implement team management page
userStories.description: As an organization owner, I want to manage team members so that we can collaborate
acceptanceCriteria: Create /team route with member list
Show member name, email, role, and status
Allow inviting new members via email
Allow changing member roles (admin, member, viewer)
Allow removing members with confirmation
userStories.notes: Only owners and admins can manage team

userStories.title: Implement organization settings page
userStories.description: As an organization admin, I want to configure settings so that I can customize the platform
acceptanceCriteria: Create /settings route with organization configuration
Allow editing organization name
Configure default AWS region
Set notification preferences (email frequency, alert types)
Show organization ID for support reference

userStories.title: Implement cron jobs for scheduled analysis
userStories.description: As a user, I want automated daily cost collection so that my data is always current
acceptanceCriteria: Create crons.ts with daily cost collection job
Run for all connected AWS accounts with active subscriptions
Use Workpool for job prioritization
Trigger AI agent analysis_run for each account
Handle failures gracefully with Action Retrier

userStories.title: Implement weekly summary email cron
userStories.description: As a user, I want weekly email summaries so that I stay informed without logging in
acceptanceCriteria: Add weekly cron job to crons.ts
Generate summary using AI agent
Include total spend, top changes, and top recommendations
Send via Resend component
Respect user notification preferences

userStories.title: Implement partner dashboard - organization list
userStories.description: As a partner, I want to see all my client organizations so that I can manage them from one place
acceptanceCriteria: Create /partner route for partner dashboard
Display list of managed client organizations
Show summary stats: total cost, account count, alert count per org
Allow switching into client org context
Distinguish partner view with different UI treatment
userStories.notes: Partner isolation is critical for security

userStories.title: Implement partner - client organization creation
userStories.description: As a partner, I want to create client organizations so that I can onboard new customers
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'Create Client Org' button to partner dashboard
Collect client organization name and primary contact email
Create organization with partner as admin
Send invite email to client primary contact
Client becomes owner after accepting invite
userStories.notes: Partners can create orgs on behalf of clients

userStories.title: Implement partner - aggregate reporting
userStories.description: As a partner, I want aggregate reports across clients so that I can show my value
acceptanceCriteria: Add aggregate view to partner dashboard
Show total managed spend across all clients
Display total savings recommendations
Allow generating cross-client reports
Maintain client data isolation in reports
userStories.notes: Aggregate view without exposing individual client data

userStories.title: Implement landing page with pricing
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want a landing page so that I can learn about the product and pricing
acceptanceCriteria: Create / route with marketing landing page
Display product value proposition and features
Show pricing tiers: Free, Pro, Enterprise
Include call-to-action buttons for signup
Add testimonials or social proof section

userStories.title: Deploy sandbox worker to Cloudflare
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the sandbox deployed so that the platform can execute AWS commands in production
acceptanceCriteria: Configure production wrangler.jsonc with secrets
Deploy container with wrangler deploy
Verify /health endpoint returns 200
Test /execute endpoint with test credentials
Document deployment process in README

userStories.title: Deploy frontend to Cloudflare Pages
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the frontend deployed so that users can access the application
acceptanceCriteria: Configure Cloudflare Pages project for apps/web
Set up environment variables for Convex URL
Configure build command and output directory
Set up custom domain if applicable
Verify app loads and auth works in production

userStories.title: Implement error handling and loading states
userStories.description: As a user, I want clear feedback during operations so that I know what's happening
acceptanceCriteria: Add loading spinners for async operations
Display error messages with retry options
Handle network errors gracefully
Show empty states for lists with no data
Add toast notifications for success/error feedback

userStories.title: Implement activity logging
userStories.description: As an admin, I want activity logs so that I can audit actions in my organization
acceptanceCriteria: Create activityLogs table with user, action, entity, timestamp
Log all mutations (create, update, delete) automatically
Create /settings/activity route to view logs
Filter by user, action type, and date range
Retain logs for 90 days

userStories.title: Add rate limiting to critical endpoints
userStories.description: As a developer, I want rate limiting so that the platform is protected from abuse
acceptanceCriteria: Apply rate limiter to sandbox execution (10 per minute per org)
Apply rate limiter to auth endpoints (5 attempts per minute per IP)
Apply rate limiter to AI chat (20 messages per minute per user)
Return 429 status with retry-after header when limited
Log rate limit events for monitoring

userStories.title: Write integration tests for core flows
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests so that I can verify the platform works correctly
acceptanceCriteria: Set up Vitest with test utilities
Write tests for organization creation flow
Write tests for AWS account connection flow
Write tests for AI chat flow
Write tests for billing/subscription flow
All tests pass in CI

userStories.title: Create documentation and README
userStories.description: As a developer, I want documentation so that I can understand and contribute to the project
acceptanceCriteria: Create comprehensive README.md with project overview
Document local development setup
Document environment variables required
Document deployment process
Add architecture diagram
